Get-CimInstance Win32_LogicalDisk | Select DeviceID, @{N='Free(GB)';E={[math]::Round($_.FreeSpace/1GB,1)}} | Out-String

python --version 2>&1; docker --version 2>&1; git --version 2>&1; node --version 2>&1
$env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -ne '' } | Out-String

args.command: Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor | Select Name, NumberOfCores, MaxClockSpeed | Out-String
Get-CimInstance Win32_PhysicalMemory | Select Manufacturer, Capacity, Speed | Out-String
Get-CimInstance Win32_BaseBoard | Select Manufacturer, Product | Out-String
Get-PhysicalDisk | Select FriendlyName, MediaType, HealthStatus, Size | Out-String
Get-CimInstance Win32_BIOS | Select SMBIOSBIOSVersion | Out-String

name: check_performances
description: Check performances: CPU load, RAM, top processus, GPU temp

args.command: $cpu = (Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor).LoadPercentage; "CPU: $cpu%"
$os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $used = [math]::Round(($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize - $os.FreePhysicalMemory)/1MB,1); "RAM utilisee: $used GB"
Get-Process | Sort WorkingSet64 -Desc | Select -First 5 Name, @{N='MB';E={[math]::Round($_.WorkingSet64/1MB)}} | Out-String

name: rapport_batterie
description: Rapport batterie complet: niveau, sante, estimation autonomie

args.command: $b = Get-CimInstance Win32_Battery; if ($b) { "Niveau: $($b.EstimatedChargeRemaining)%`nStatut: $($b.BatteryStatus)`nEstimation: $($b.EstimatedRunTime) min" } else { 'PC fixe - pas de batterie' }
powercfg /batteryreport /output $env:TEMP\battery.html 2>$null; 'Rapport genere dans Temp'

description: Mode accessibilite complet: loupe + narrateur + contraste + clavier virtuel

args.command: Start-Process osk

name: navigation_rapide
description: Navigation rapide: nouveau tab + favoris + zoom reset

name: audit_reseau
description: Audit reseau: IP publique, DNS, ports ouverts, ARP, vitesse

args.command: (Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://api.ipify.org' -UseBasicParsing).Content
Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Select LocalPort, @{N='Process';E={(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Name}} | Sort LocalPort | Select -First 15 | Out-String
Get-NetNeighbor | Where State -ne Unreachable | Select IPAddress, LinkLayerAddress | Out-String
Get-NetAdapter | Where Status -eq Up | Select Name, LinkSpeed | Out-String

name: optimise_dns
description: Optimisation DNS: flush + passage sur Cloudflare + test

args.command: ipconfig /flushdns; 'DNS flush OK'
Set-DnsClientServerAddress -InterfaceAlias 'Wi-Fi' -ServerAddresses ('1.1.1.1','1.0.0.1'); 'DNS Cloudflare configure'

name: diagnostic_connexion
description: Diagnostic connexion internet: ping, DNS, IP, vitesse, tracert

args.command: Get-NetAdapter | Where Status -eq Up | Select Name, LinkSpeed, Status | Out-String
Resolve-DnsName google.com -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Name, IPAddress | Out-String
(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://api.ipify.org' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5).Content

name: nettoyage_fichiers
description: Nettoyage fichiers: doublons + gros fichiers + dossiers vides + temp

args.command: Remove-Item $env:TEMP\* -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; 'Temp nettoye'

$e = Get-ChildItem -Directory -Recurse -Path $env:USERPROFILE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where { (Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Count -eq 0 }; "$($e.Count) dossiers vides trouves"
Get-ChildItem $env:USERPROFILE -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort Length -Desc | Select -First 10 Name, @{N='MB';E={[math]::Round($_.Length/1MB,1)}} | Out-String

name: backup_projet
description: Backup projet: compresse le dossier turbo + git status + timestamp

args.command: cd \home\turbo\jarvis; git status --short | Out-String
$ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'; Compress-Archive -Path '\home\turbo\jarvis\src' -DestinationPath "\home\turbo\jarvis_backup_$ts.zip" -Force; "Backup: turbo_backup_$ts.zip"

name: analyse_code
description: Analyse code: fichiers Python, lignes, taille, structure

args.command: $py = Get-ChildItem '\home\turbo\jarvis\src' -Filter '*.py' -Recurse; "$($py.Count) fichiers Python"
$lines = (Get-ChildItem '\home\turbo\jarvis\src' -Filter '*.py' -Recurse | Get-Content | Measure-Object -Line).Lines; "$lines lignes de code"
$s = (Get-ChildItem '\home\turbo\jarvis\src' -Recurse -File | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum / 1KB; "Taille src: $([math]::Round($s,1)) KB"

name: forge_code
description: The Forge: M2 genere le code, M1 review logique, correction auto si erreur

args.prompt: Genere le code Python demande. Code uniquement, pas d'explication.
Review ce code. Identifie bugs, problemes logiques, optimisations. Sois precis.

args.title: JARVIS Forge
args.message: Code genere par M2 et review par M1.

name: shield_audit
description: The Shield: Audit securite multi-IA parallele (M1 + M2 analysent en parallele)

args.prompt: Analyse ce code pour les failles de securite: injections SQL, XSS, fuites de cles API, OWASP top 10. Liste chaque probleme.
Verifie ce code pour les bugs logiques, race conditions, et erreurs de gestion memoire.

args.title: JARVIS Shield
args.message: Audit securite termine. M1 + M2 ont analyse.

name: brain_index
description: The Brain: Indexe le projet dans la memoire JARVIS via M1

args.command: $py = Get-ChildItem '\home\turbo\jarvis\src' -Filter '*.py' -Recurse; $py | Select Name, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round($_.Length/1KB,1)}} | Out-String
$lines = (Get-ChildItem '\home\turbo\jarvis\src' -Filter '*.py' -Recurse | Get-Content | Measure-Object -Line).Lines; "$lines lignes de code total"

args.prompt: Resume en 5 lignes l'architecture de ce projet Python: structure des fichiers, patterns utilises, technologies.

name: medic_repair
description: The Medic: Auto-reparation cluster — verifie et relance M1, M2, Ollama

args.command: $r = try { (Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:1234/api/v1/models' -Headers @{Authorization='Bearer '} -TimeoutSec 3).StatusCode } catch { 0 }; if ($r -eq 200) { 'M1 OK' } else { 'M1 OFFLINE — relance LM Studio' }

$r = try { (Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://192.168.1.26:1234/api/v1/models' -Headers @{Authorization='Bearer '} -TimeoutSec 3).StatusCode } catch { 0 }; if ($r -eq 200) { 'M2 OK' } else { 'M2 OFFLINE' }

$r = try { (Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags' -TimeoutSec 3).StatusCode } catch { 0 }; if ($r -eq 200) { 'Ollama OK' } else { Start-Process ollama -ArgumentList 'serve' -WindowStyle Hidden; 'Ollama relance' }

name: consensus_mao
description: MAO Consensus: Question envoyee a M1 + M2 + OL1, synthese des reponses

args.prompt: Reponds a cette question avec ta recommandation + niveau de confiance (1-10) + justification courte.
Donne ton avis sur cette question en 3 lignes. Niveau de confiance 1-10.

name: lab_tests
description: The Lab: M1 genere les tests, execute localement, M2 analyse les echecs

args.prompt: Genere un script pytest complet pour tester le code demande. Code uniquement.

args.command: cd \home\turbo\jarvis; & 'uv' run python -m pytest src/ --tb=short -q 2>&1 | Out-String

name: architect_diagram
description: The Architect: M1 analyse le code et genere un diagramme Mermaid de l'architecture

args.command: $py = Get-ChildItem '\home\turbo\jarvis\src' -Filter '*.py' -Recurse; $py | ForEach-Object { $_.Name + ': ' + (Select-String -Path $_.FullName -Pattern '^(class |def |async def )' | Measure-Object).Count + ' definitions' } | Out-String

args.prompt: Analyse cette structure de fichiers Python et genere un diagramme Mermaid.js montrant les relations entre modules. Format: ```mermaid ... ```

name: oracle_veille
description: The Oracle: Recherche web via OL1 cloud (minimax) + synthese M1

args.query: Recherche les dernieres informations sur le sujet demande

args.prompt: Synthese en 5 points des informations trouvees. Sois factuel et precis.

name: sentinel_securite
description: The Sentinel: Scan ports ouverts, connexions actives, processus suspects

args.command: Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Select LocalPort, @{N='Process';E={(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Name}} | Sort LocalPort | Out-String

Get-NetTCPConnection -State Established | Where { $_.RemoteAddress -notmatch '^(127|10|192\.168|0\.0)' } | Select RemoteAddress, RemotePort, @{N='Process';E={(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Name}} | Out-String
Get-NetFirewallRule -Enabled True -Direction Inbound | Where Action -eq Allow | Select DisplayName, Profile | Select -First 10 | Out-String

name: alchemist_transform
description: The Alchemist: M1 transforme des donnees d'un format a un autre (CSV, JSON, SQL...)

args.prompt: Transforme ces donnees dans le format demande. Retourne uniquement les donnees converties, pas d'explication.

name: director_standup
description: The Director: Rapport quotidien basé sur git log + status systeme + trading

args.command: cd \home\turbo\jarvis; git log --since='24 hours ago' --oneline 2>&1 | Out-String

args.prompt: En tant que chef de projet, fais un rapport vocal court (5 lignes max) de l'avancement basé sur ces infos: commits recents, status systeme, status trading.

name: linux_health_check
description: Diagnostic complet santé Linux: CPU, RAM, GPU, disques, services, réseau

args.command: echo '=== CPU ===' && cat /proc/loadavg && echo '=== RAM ===' && free -h && echo '=== GPU ===' && nvidia-smi --query-gpu=name,temperature.gpu,utilization.gpu,memory.used --format=csv,noheader && echo '=== DISK ===' && df -h / /home && echo '=== SERVICES ===' && systemctl --user list-units jarvis-* --no-pager | grep -E 'running|failed' && echo '=== NETWORK ===' && ip -br addr | grep UP

name: optimise_gpu_linux
description: Optimisation GPU: températures, VRAM, processus idle, persistence mode

args.command: nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,name,temperature.gpu,utilization.gpu,memory.used,memory.total,fan.speed,power.draw --format=csv,noheader
nvidia-smi --query-compute-apps=pid,name,used_memory --format=csv,noheader 2>/dev/null
nvidia-smi -pm 1 2>/dev/null
sync && echo 3 | sudo tee /proc/sys/vm/drop_caches > /dev/null

name: backup_jarvis_linux
description: Backup complet JARVIS: bases de données, configs, scripts, git bundle

args.command: mkdir -p /home/turbo/jarvis/backups/$(date +%Y%m%d)
for db in /home/turbo/jarvis/data/*.db; do sqlite3 "$db" ".backup /home/turbo/jarvis/backups/$(date +%Y%m%d)/$(basename $db)"; done && echo 'DBs sauvegardées'
cp /home/turbo/jarvis/data/skills.json /home/turbo/jarvis/backups/$(date +%Y%m%d)/skills.json && echo 'Skills sauvegardés'
cd /home/turbo/jarvis && git bundle create backups/$(date +%Y%m%d)/jarvis-$(date +%Y%m%d).bundle --all && echo 'Git bundle créé'
du -sh /home/turbo/jarvis/backups/$(date +%Y%m%d)/ && echo 'Backup terminé'

name: cluster_check_linux
description: Vérification complète du cluster JARVIS: M1, M2, M3, OL1, latences, modèles

args.command: echo '=== M1 ===' && curl -s --max-time 3 http://127.0.0.1:1234/api/v1/models | python3 -c 'import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);[print(f"  {m["id"]}") for m in d.get("data",[])]' 2>/dev/null || echo '  OFFLINE'

echo '=== M2 ===' && curl -s --max-time 3 http://192.168.1.26:1234/api/v1/models | python3 -c 'import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);[print(f"  {m["id"]}") for m in d.get("data",[])]' 2>/dev/null || echo '  OFFLINE'

echo '=== M3 ===' && curl -s --max-time 3 http://192.168.1.113:1234/api/v1/models | python3 -c 'import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);[print(f"  {m["id"]}") for m in d.get("data",[])]' 2>/dev/null || echo '  OFFLINE'

echo '=== OL1 ===' && curl -s --max-time 3 http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags | python3 -c 'import sys,json;[print(f"  {m["name"]}") for m in json.load(sys.stdin).get("models",[])]' 2>/dev/null || echo '  OFFLINE'

name: fix_audio_linux
description: Réparer le son: restart PipeWire/PulseAudio, vérifier sinks, volume

args.command: echo '=== ÉTAT AUDIO ===' && pactl info | grep -E 'Server Name|Default Sink'
systemctl --user restart pipewire pipewire-pulse wireplumber 2>/dev/null && echo 'PipeWire redémarré' || (pulseaudio -k && pulseaudio --start && echo 'PulseAudio redémarré')
sleep 1 && pactl list sinks short
pactl set-sink-mute @DEFAULT_SINK@ 0 && pactl set-sink-volume @DEFAULT_SINK@ 70% && echo 'Volume à 70%, unmute'

name: git_status_jarvis
description: État git JARVIS: status, branches, derniers commits, diff résumé

args.command: cd /home/turbo/jarvis && echo '=== BRANCHE ===' && git branch --show-current && echo '=== STATUS ===' && git status --short | head -20 && echo '=== DERNIERS COMMITS ===' && git log --oneline -10
cd /home/turbo/jarvis && echo '=== FICHIERS MODIFIÉS ===' && git diff --stat | tail -5

name: wifi_manager_linux
description: Gestion WiFi: scanner, connecter, déconnecter, info connexion

args.command: echo '=== CONNEXION ACTIVE ===' && nmcli -t -f NAME,DEVICE,TYPE con show --active 2>/dev/null
echo '=== SIGNAL ===' && nmcli -f SSID,SIGNAL,SECURITY dev wifi list 2>/dev/null | head -15
echo '=== IP ===' && ip -br addr | grep wl

name: process_killer_linux
description: Gestion processus: top consommateurs, kill processus, zombies

args.command: echo '=== TOP CPU ===' && ps aux --sort=-%cpu | head -8
echo '=== TOP RAM ===' && ps aux --sort=-%mem | head -8
echo '=== ZOMBIES ===' && ps aux | awk '$8=="Z"' | head -5 || echo 'Aucun zombie'

name: desktop_reset_linux
description: Reset bureau GNOME: restart shell, extensions, thème, résolution

args.command: busctl --user call org.gnome.Shell /org/gnome/Shell org.gnome.Shell Eval s 'Meta.restart("Restarting…")' 2>/dev/null && echo 'GNOME Shell redémarré' || echo 'Restart via busctl échoué'
sleep 2 && gnome-extensions list --enabled 2>/dev/null | head -10
gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.interface color-scheme && xrandr | grep ' connected' | head -3

name: disk_analysis_linux
description: Analyse disque: espace, gros fichiers, SMART, IO

args.command: echo '=== ESPACE ===' && df -h / /home /tmp
echo '=== TOP 10 GROS FICHIERS ===' && find /home/turbo -type f -size +100M -exec ls -lh {} \; 2>/dev/null | sort -k5 -h -r | head -10
echo '=== TOP DOSSIERS ===' && du -sh /home/turbo/*/ 2>/dev/null | sort -h -r | head -10
echo '=== SMART ===' && sudo smartctl -H /dev/sda 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'result|Status' || echo 'smartctl non disponible'

name: service_manager_linux
description: Gestion services JARVIS: lister, redémarrer, activer, désactiver

args.command: echo '=== SERVICES ACTIFS ===' && systemctl --user list-units jarvis-* --no-pager --no-legend | grep running
echo '=== SERVICES FAILED ===' && systemctl --user list-units jarvis-* --no-pager --no-legend | grep -E 'failed|dead' || echo 'Aucun service en échec'
echo '=== TIMERS ===' && systemctl --user list-timers jarvis-* --no-pager --no-legend | head -10

echo '=== MÉMOIRE SERVICES ===' && systemctl --user list-units jarvis-* --no-pager --no-legend | awk '{print $1}' | while read s; do m=$(systemctl --user show $s --property=MemoryCurrent --value 2>/dev/null); [ "$m" != "[not set]" ] && [ -n "$m" ] && echo "  $s: $((m/1024/1024))MB"; done 2>/dev/null

name: voice_test_linux
description: Test pipeline vocal: Vosk, Whisper, Piper TTS, microphone

args.command: echo '=== MICROPHONE ===' && arecord -l 2>/dev/null | grep -i card || echo 'Aucun micro détecté'
echo '=== WHISPER ===' && curl -s --max-time 3 http://127.0.0.1:9000/health 2>/dev/null && echo 'Whisper OK' || echo 'Whisper OFFLINE'
echo '=== VOSK ===' && ls /home/turbo/jarvis/data/vosk-model-small-fr-0.22/ >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'Modèle Vosk OK' || echo 'Modèle Vosk MANQUANT'
echo '=== PIPER TTS ===' && which piper >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'Piper installé' || echo 'Piper NON installé'
echo '=== SERVICE VOCAL ===' && systemctl --user is-active jarvis-voice 2>/dev/null || echo 'Service vocal inactif'

name: maintenance_complete_linux
description: Maintenance complete Linux: apt update/upgrade, snap refresh, autoremove, vacuum journaux, clean tmp, check services

args.command: sudo apt update -y 2>&1 | tail -5

steps.description: Mise a jour des paquets APT

args.command: sudo apt upgrade -y 2>&1 | tail -10
sudo snap refresh 2>&1 | tail -5
sudo apt autoremove -y 2>&1 | tail -5
sudo journalctl --vacuum-time=7d 2>&1
sudo find /tmp -type f -atime +7 -delete 2>/dev/null; echo 'tmp cleaned'
systemctl --failed --no-pager 2>&1

name: securite_audit_linux
description: Audit de securite Linux: ufw, fail2ban, ports ouverts, apparmor, rootkits, permissions home

args.command: sudo ufw status verbose 2>&1
sudo systemctl status fail2ban --no-pager 2>&1 | head -20
sudo ss -tulnp 2>&1 | head -30

steps.description: Ports ouverts et services a l'ecoute

args.command: sudo aa-status 2>&1 | head -20
sudo chkrootkit 2>&1 | grep -i 'infected\|INFECTED' || echo 'Aucun rootkit detecte'
find /home -maxdepth 2 -type f -perm /o+w 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo '--- Permissions /home verifiees ---'

name: optimise_systeme_linux
description: Optimisation systeme Linux: swap, caches, GPU, zombies, compactage DB, espace disque

args.command: sudo swapoff -a && sudo swapon -a 2>&1; echo 'Swap reinitialise'
sync && echo 3 | sudo tee /proc/sys/vm/drop_caches > /dev/null; echo 'Caches dropped'
for gpu in $(seq 0 5); do sudo nvidia-smi -i $gpu -pm 1 2>/dev/null; done; nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,name,power.draw,temperature.gpu --format=csv,noheader 2>&1
ps aux | awk '$8=="Z" {print $2}' | xargs -r sudo kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'Zombies tues'
sudo sqlite3 /home/turbo/jarvis/memory/long_term.db 'VACUUM;' 2>/dev/null; echo 'DB compactee'
df -h / /home /tmp 2>&1

name: backup_complet_linux
description: Backup complet Linux: snapshot LVM, dump DBs, tar configs, sync backup, verification checksums

args.command: sudo lvcreate --size 2G --snapshot --name jarvis_snap /dev/mapper/ubuntu--vg-ubuntu--lv 2>&1 || echo 'LVM snapshot skip (pas de LVM ou deja existant)'
mkdir -p /home/turbo/backups/$(date +%Y%m%d) && sqlite3 /home/turbo/jarvis/memory/long_term.db '.backup /home/turbo/backups/'$(date +%Y%m%d)'/long_term.db' 2>&1; echo 'DB backed up'

tar czf /home/turbo/backups/$(date +%Y%m%d)/configs_$(date +%Y%m%d).tar.gz /etc/nginx /etc/ufw /etc/fail2ban /home/turbo/jarvis/data/skills.json /home/turbo/jarvis/src/config.py 2>&1 | tail -3; echo 'Configs archived'
rsync -avz --delete /home/turbo/jarvis/ /home/turbo/backups/$(date +%Y%m%d)/jarvis_sync/ 2>&1 | tail -5; echo 'Sync done'
cd /home/turbo/backups/$(date +%Y%m%d) && sha256sum *.tar.gz *.db 2>/dev/null > checksums.sha256 && cat checksums.sha256; echo 'Checksums generated'

name: diagnostic_reseau_linux
description: Diagnostic reseau complet Linux: IP, nmcli, DNS, ping, traceroute, connexions, bande passante

args.command: ip addr show 2>&1 | grep -E 'inet |state' | head -20
nmcli general status 2>&1; echo '---'; nmcli device status 2>&1
dig google.com +short 2>&1; echo '---'; cat /etc/resolv.conf | grep nameserver
ip route | grep default; echo '---'; ping -c 3 $(ip route | grep default | awk '{print $3}') 2>&1
traceroute -m 15 -w 2 8.8.8.8 2>&1 | head -20
ss -tunap 2>&1 | head -30
timeout 10 curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'Download speed: %{speed_download} bytes/sec\nTotal time: %{time_total}s\n' https://speed.cloudflare.com/__down?bytes=10000000 2>&1 || echo 'Speed test timeout'

name: mode_dev_linux
description: Mode developpement Linux: VSCode, terminal, git status, services, GPU, load model M1

args.command: gnome-terminal --tab --title='JARVIS' -- bash -c 'exec bash' 2>/dev/null &; echo 'Terminal JARVIS ouvert'
git status --short 2>&1 | head -20
systemctl --user list-units --state=running --no-pager 2>&1 | head -15; echo '---'; systemctl list-units --state=running --no-pager 2>&1 | grep -E 'jarvis|flask|lm|whisper' | head -10

steps.description: Statut cluster IA et modeles M1

name: rapport_systeme_linux
description: Rapport systeme complet Linux: CPU/RAM/Disk, GPU, services, cluster, uptime, erreurs journal

args.command: systemctl list-units --state=running --no-pager 2>&1 | grep -E 'jarvis|flask|lm|whisper|nginx|trading|domino' | head -15
uptime 2>&1; echo '---'; cat /proc/loadavg 2>&1
journalctl --priority=err --since='24 hours ago' --no-pager 2>&1 | tail -25

echo '=== RAPPORT SYSTEME LINUX ===' && echo "Date: $(date)" && echo "Hostname: $(hostname)" && echo "Kernel: $(uname -r)" && echo "Load: $(cat /proc/loadavg)" && df -h / /home | tail -2 && free -h | head -2

name: nettoyage_profond_linux
description: Nettoyage profond Linux: corbeille, autoremove, snap prune, journal vacuum, vieux logs, docker prune, tmp

args.command: rm -rf ~/.local/share/Trash/files/* ~/.local/share/Trash/info/* 2>/dev/null; echo 'Corbeille videe'
sudo apt autoremove -y && sudo apt autoclean -y 2>&1 | tail -5
snap list --all | awk '/disabled/{print $1, $3}' | while read snapname revision; do sudo snap remove "$snapname" --revision="$revision" 2>/dev/null; done; echo 'Snap prune done'
sudo journalctl --vacuum-size=200M 2>&1
sudo find /var/log -name '*.gz' -delete 2>/dev/null; sudo find /var/log -name '*.old' -delete 2>/dev/null; sudo find /var/log -name '*.1' -delete 2>/dev/null; echo 'Vieux logs supprimes'
docker system prune -af --volumes 2>&1 | tail -5 || echo 'Docker non installe ou non actif'
sudo rm -rf /tmp/* /var/tmp/* 2>/dev/null; echo 'Tmp nettoye'; df -h / | tail -1

steps.description: Nettoyage tmp et verification espace libere

name: preparation_trading_linux
description: Preparation trading Linux: check GPU temps, load models, cluster, TradingView, pipeline, connexions

args.command: nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,temperature.gpu,power.draw,memory.used,memory.total --format=csv,noheader 2>&1
curl -s http://localhost:8080/health 2>&1 || echo 'MCP Flask non joignable'; curl -s http://lmt2:1234/v1/models 2>&1 | head -5 || echo 'LM Studio M2 non joignable'

name: bonne_nuit_linux
description: Bonne nuit Linux: sauvegarde, backup DBs, check crons, power-saver, reduce GPU, stop services, lock screen

args.command: sync; echo 'Toutes les ecritures synchronisees'
mkdir -p /home/turbo/backups/nightly && sqlite3 /home/turbo/jarvis/memory/long_term.db '.backup /home/turbo/backups/nightly/long_term_$(date +%Y%m%d).db' 2>&1; echo 'DB sauvegardee'
crontab -l 2>&1; echo '---'; sudo systemctl list-timers --no-pager 2>&1 | head -10
sudo cpupower frequency-set -g powersave 2>/dev/null || echo 'cpupower non dispo'; echo 'Mode economie active'
for gpu in $(seq 0 5); do sudo nvidia-smi -i $gpu -pl 50 2>/dev/null; done; echo 'GPUs en mode basse consommation'
sudo systemctl stop whisperflow 2>/dev/null; sudo systemctl stop jarvis-web 2>/dev/null; echo 'Services non-essentiels arretes'
loginctl lock-session 2>/dev/null || xdg-screensaver lock 2>/dev/null || gnome-screensaver-command -l 2>/dev/null; echo 'Ecran verrouille'

name: screenshot_ocr_linux
description: Capture écran avec OCR: screenshot, extraction texte, description IA

args.command: gnome-screenshot -f /tmp/jarvis-screenshot-$(date +%s).png && echo 'Capture: /tmp/jarvis-screenshot-*.png' && ls -t /tmp/jarvis-screenshot-*.png | head -1
IMG=$(ls -t /tmp/jarvis-screenshot-*.png | head -1) && tesseract "$IMG" stdout -l fra 2>/dev/null | head -30 || echo 'tesseract non installé'

name: bluetooth_manager_linux
description: Gestion Bluetooth: scanner, connecter, déconnecter, info appareils

args.command: bluetoothctl show 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'Powered|Name' || echo 'Bluetooth non disponible'
bluetoothctl devices 2>/dev/null || echo 'Aucun appareil'
bluetoothctl info 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'Name|Connected|Battery' || echo 'Pas d appareil connecté'

name: system_benchmark_linux
description: Benchmark système: CPU, RAM, disque, GPU, réseau

args.command: echo '=== CPU ===' && python3 -c 'import time;s=time.time();sum(range(10**7));print(f"10M additions: {time.time()-s:.2f}s")'
echo '=== DISQUE ===' && dd if=/dev/zero of=/tmp/jarvis-bench.tmp bs=1M count=256 oflag=dsync 2>&1 | tail -1 && rm -f /tmp/jarvis-bench.tmp
echo '=== GPU ===' && nvidia-smi --query-gpu=name,clocks.gr,clocks.mem,power.draw --format=csv,noheader

echo '=== RÉSEAU ===' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'Download: %{speed_download} bytes/s\nLatency: %{time_connect}s' https://speed.cloudflare.com/__down?bytes=1000000 2>/dev/null || echo 'Test réseau échoué'

name: docker_manager_linux
description: Gestion Docker: containers, images, logs, restart, prune

args.command: echo '=== CONTAINERS ===' && docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}' 2>/dev/null || echo 'Docker non disponible'
echo '=== IMAGES ===' && docker images --format 'table {{.Repository}}\t{{.Tag}}\t{{.Size}}' 2>/dev/null | head -15
echo '=== ESPACE ===' && docker system df 2>/dev/null

name: cron_audit_linux
description: Audit des tâches planifiées: crons, timers systemd, at jobs

args.command: echo '=== CRONS USER ===' && crontab -l 2>/dev/null || echo 'Aucun cron utilisateur'
echo '=== TIMERS SYSTEMD ===' && systemctl --user list-timers --no-pager | head -15
echo '=== TIMERS SYSTEM ===' && systemctl list-timers --no-pager | head -10
echo '=== AT JOBS ===' && atq 2>/dev/null || echo 'Aucun at job'

name: usb_devices_linux
description: Gestion USB: lister appareils, éjecter, monter clés USB

args.command: echo '=== USB DEVICES ===' && lsusb | grep -v 'hub' | head -15
echo '=== STOCKAGE AMOVIBLE ===' && lsblk -o NAME,SIZE,TYPE,MOUNTPOINT | grep -E 'disk|part' | head -10
echo '=== MONTAGES ===' && mount | grep -E '/media|/mnt' || echo 'Aucun montage externe'

name: printer_manager_linux
description: Gestion imprimantes: lister, imprimer, file d'attente, état

args.command: lpstat -p 2>/dev/null || echo 'CUPS non disponible'
lpstat -o 2>/dev/null || echo 'Aucun job en file'

name: startup_optimizer_linux
description: Optimiser le démarrage: analyser temps boot, apps autostart, services lents

args.command: echo '=== TEMPS BOOT ===' && systemd-analyze
echo '=== TOP 10 SERVICES LENTS ===' && systemd-analyze blame | head -10
echo '=== AUTOSTART ===' && ls ~/.config/autostart/ 2>/dev/null
echo '=== SERVICES ENABLED ===' && systemctl --user list-unit-files --state=enabled --no-pager | head -20

name: log_forensics_linux
description: Analyse forensique des logs: erreurs critiques, patterns, anomalies, timeline

args.command: echo '=== ERREURS CRITIQUES 24H ===' && journalctl -p crit --since '24h ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -20
echo '=== KERNEL ERRORS ===' && journalctl -k -p err --since '24h ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -10
echo '=== OOM KILLS ===' && journalctl --since '7d ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'oom\|out of memory' | tail -5 || echo 'Aucun OOM'
echo '=== SEGFAULTS ===' && journalctl --since '7d ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -i segfault | tail -5 || echo 'Aucun segfault'
echo '=== GPU ERRORS ===' && journalctl --since '24h ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'nvidia\|gpu\|xid' | grep -i 'err\|fail\|fault' | tail -5 || echo 'Aucune erreur GPU'

name: model_manager_linux
description: Gestion modèles IA: lister, charger, décharger, benchmark modèles sur cluster

args.command: echo '=== M1 (LM Studio) ===' && curl -s --max-time 3 http://127.0.0.1:1234/api/v1/models 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import sys,json;[print(f"  {m["id"]}") for m in json.load(sys.stdin).get("data",[])]' 2>/dev/null || echo '  OFFLINE'

echo '=== OL1 (Ollama) ===' && curl -s --max-time 3 http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import sys,json;[print(f"  {m["name"]} ({m.get("size",0)//1e9:.1f}GB)") for m in json.load(sys.stdin).get("models",[])]' 2>/dev/null || echo '  OFFLINE'
echo '=== VRAM ===' && nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,memory.total --format=csv,noheader

name: database_manager_linux
description: Gestion bases de données JARVIS: tailles, intégrité, vacuum, stats

args.command: echo '=== TAILLES ===' && for db in /home/turbo/jarvis/data/*.db; do echo "  $(basename $db): $(du -sh $db 2>/dev/null | cut -f1)"; done
echo '=== INTÉGRITÉ ===' && for db in /home/turbo/jarvis/data/*.db; do r=$(sqlite3 $db 'PRAGMA integrity_check;' 2>/dev/null); echo "  $(basename $db): $r"; done
echo '=== TABLES JARVIS.DB ===' && sqlite3 /home/turbo/jarvis/data/jarvis.db '.tables' 2>/dev/null

echo '=== STATS ===' && sqlite3 /home/turbo/jarvis/data/jarvis.db 'SELECT "commands: " || COUNT(*) FROM commands UNION ALL SELECT "voice_commands: " || COUNT(*) FROM voice_commands UNION ALL SELECT "skills: " || (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voice_corrections)' 2>/dev/null

name: notification_center_linux
description: Centre de notifications: envoyer, historique, activer/désactiver DND

args.command: gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.notifications show-banners && echo 'Notifications: activées' || echo 'Notifications: désactivées'
notify-send 'JARVIS' 'Test notification - Système opérationnel' -i dialog-information

name: theme_switcher_linux
description: Changer thème GNOME: sombre, clair, accent, icônes, curseur, fond d'écran

args.command: echo '=== THÈME ACTUEL ===' && gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.interface color-scheme && gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.interface gtk-theme && gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.interface icon-theme
echo '=== FOND D ÉCRAN ===' && gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.background picture-uri-dark 2>/dev/null | tr -d "'"

name: display_manager_linux
description: Gestion écrans: résolution, multi-écran, luminosité, orientation

args.command: echo '=== ÉCRANS ===' && xrandr --query 2>/dev/null | grep ' connected'
echo '=== RÉSOLUTION ===' && xrandr --query 2>/dev/null | grep '*'
echo '=== LUMINOSITÉ ===' && cat /sys/class/backlight/*/brightness 2>/dev/null || xrandr --verbose 2>/dev/null | grep -i brightness | head -1 || echo 'Non disponible'

name: keyboard_layout_linux
description: Gestion clavier: layout, raccourcis personnalisés, vitesse de répétition

args.command: echo '=== LAYOUT ===' && setxkbmap -query 2>/dev/null || gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.input-sources sources
echo '=== RACCOURCIS CUSTOM ===' && gsettings get org.gnome.settings-daemon.plugins.media-keys custom-keybindings 2>/dev/null

name: jarvis_self_diagnostic
description: Auto-diagnostic complet JARVIS: services, DB, voice, brain, cluster, dashboard

args.command: echo '=== SERVICES ===' && systemctl --user list-units jarvis-* --no-pager --no-legend | awk '{print $4, $1}' | sort
echo '=== BASES DE DONNÉES ===' && for db in /home/turbo/jarvis/data/{jarvis,etoile}.db; do echo "$(basename $db): $(sqlite3 $db 'PRAGMA integrity_check;' 2>/dev/null)"; done
echo '=== DASHBOARD WEB ===' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8088 && echo ' OK' || echo 'OFFLINE'
echo '=== MCP SERVER ===' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8080 && echo ' OK' || echo 'OFFLINE'
echo '=== WHISPER ===' && curl -s --max-time 2 http://127.0.0.1:9000/health 2>/dev/null && echo 'OK' || echo 'OFFLINE'
echo '=== BRAIN ===' && python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/home/turbo/jarvis/data/skills.json')); print(f'{len(d)} skills')" 2>/dev/null
echo '=== CLUSTER ===' && for u in http://127.0.0.1:1234/api/v1/models http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags; do curl -s --max-time 2 $u >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "$u: OK" || echo "$u: OFFLINE"; done

name: file_search_linux
description: Recherche de fichiers: par nom, contenu, taille, date, type

args.command: echo 'Usage: dis-moi quel fichier chercher et je le trouverai' && echo '=== FICHIERS RÉCENTS ===' && find /home/turbo -maxdepth 3 -type f -mmin -60 -not -path '*/.*' 2>/dev/null | head -15
echo '=== GROS FICHIERS ===' && find /home/turbo -type f -size +500M -not -path '*/.cache/*' 2>/dev/null | head -10

name: focus_mode_linux
description: Mode focus: DND, ferme distractions, timer pomodoro, réduit notifications

args.command: gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.notifications show-banners false && echo 'Notifications désactivées'
wmctrl -c 'Discord' 2>/dev/null; wmctrl -c 'Spotify' 2>/dev/null; wmctrl -c 'Telegram' 2>/dev/null; echo 'Distractions fermées'

notify-send 'JARVIS Focus Mode' '25 minutes de concentration. Go!' -i dialog-information && (sleep 1500 && notify-send 'JARVIS' 'Pause! 5 minutes.' -u critical && gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.notifications show-banners true) &

name: weather_info_linux
description: Météo locale: température, conditions, prévisions via wttr.in

args.command: curl -s 'wttr.in/?format=3&lang=fr' 2>/dev/null || echo 'Service météo indisponible'
curl -s 'wttr.in/?format=%l:+%c+%t+%h+%w&lang=fr' 2>/dev/null

name: quick_note_linux
description: Prendre une note rapide: sauvegarder texte, lister notes, chercher

args.command: mkdir -p /home/turbo/jarvis/data/notes && ls -lt /home/turbo/jarvis/data/notes/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -10 || echo 'Aucune note'
echo 'Pour créer une note, dis: jarvis note [ton texte]'

name: system_cleanup_aggressive
description: Nettoyage agressif: tout supprimer pour récupérer max d'espace disque

args.command: echo 'AVANT:' && df -h / | tail -1
sudo apt autoremove -y && sudo apt autoclean -y 2>/dev/null
snap list --all | awk '/disabled/{print $1, $3}' | while read pkg rev; do sudo snap remove "$pkg" --revision="$rev" 2>/dev/null; done
sudo journalctl --vacuum-size=50M 2>/dev/null
gio trash --empty 2>/dev/null; rm -rf ~/.cache/thumbnails/* /tmp/jarvis-* ~/.local/share/Trash/files/* 2>/dev/null
docker system prune -af 2>/dev/null
pip cache purge 2>/dev/null; npm cache clean --force 2>/dev/null
echo 'APRÈS:' && df -h / | tail -1

name: ssh_manager_linux
description: Gestion SSH: connexions, clés, tunnels, config

args.command: echo '=== CLÉS SSH ===' && ls -la ~/.ssh/*.pub 2>/dev/null || echo 'Aucune clé SSH'
echo '=== CONNEXIONS ACTIVES ===' && ss -tn state established | grep ':22' || echo 'Aucune connexion SSH'
echo '=== CONFIG ===' && cat ~/.ssh/config 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo 'Pas de config SSH'

name: convert_units_linux
description: Convertir unités: température, taille fichier, monnaie, distance

args.command: python3 -c "print('Conversions courantes:'); print('  1 GB = 1024 MB = 1048576 KB'); print('  1 TB = 1024 GB'); print('  °C → °F: (C × 9/5) + 32'); print('  1 mile = 1.609 km'); print('  1 pouce = 2.54 cm')"

name: terminal_multiplexer_linux
description: Gestion tmux: sessions, fenêtres, panneaux, attach/detach

args.command: echo '=== SESSIONS ===' && tmux list-sessions 2>/dev/null || echo 'Aucune session tmux'
echo '=== FENÊTRES ===' && tmux list-windows -a 2>/dev/null | head -15 || echo 'N/A'

name: pip_packages_linux
description: Gestion paquets Python: liste, install, outdated, vulnérabilités

args.command: echo '=== INSTALLÉS ===' && pip list 2>/dev/null | wc -l && echo 'paquets Python'
echo '=== PÉRIMÉS ===' && pip list --outdated 2>/dev/null | head -15 || echo 'Vérification impossible'
echo '=== AUDIT ===' && pip audit 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || echo 'pip-audit non installé'

name: systemd_journal_live
description: Suivi en direct des logs système: journalctl follow, filtres par service/priorité

args.command: echo '=== 20 DERNIERS LOGS ===' && journalctl --user -n 20 --no-pager 2>/dev/null
echo '=== ERREURS RÉCENTES ===' && journalctl -p err --since '1h ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -10

name: git_advanced_linux
description: Git avancé: stash, rebase, cherry-pick, bisect, reflog, blame

args.command: cd /home/turbo/jarvis && echo '=== STASH ===' && git stash list | head -5 || echo 'Aucun stash'
cd /home/turbo/jarvis && echo '=== REFLOG ===' && git reflog --oneline -10
cd /home/turbo/jarvis && echo '=== BRANCHES ===' && git branch -a --sort=-committerdate | head -10
cd /home/turbo/jarvis && echo '=== STATS ===' && git shortlog -sn --all | head -5

name: env_manager_linux
description: Gestion variables d'environnement: lister, vérifier, .env status

args.command: echo '=== JARVIS ENV ===' && env | grep -iE 'JARVIS|TELEGRAM|GEMINI|DISCORD|OPENAI|CLAUDE' | sed 's/=.*/=***/' | sort
echo '=== .ENV ===' && wc -l /home/turbo/jarvis/.env 2>/dev/null && echo 'lignes dans .env' || echo '.env non trouvé'
echo '=== PATH ===' && echo $PATH | tr ':' '\n' | head -10

name: ip_geolocation_linux
description: Géolocalisation IP: IP publique, localisation, ISP, VPN check

name: system_uptime_report
description: Rapport uptime: durée, dernier boot, reboots récents, charge moyenne

args.command: echo '=== UPTIME ===' && uptime -p && echo '=== DERNIER BOOT ===' && who -b && echo '=== CHARGE ===' && cat /proc/loadavg && echo '=== REBOOTS RÉCENTS ===' && last reboot | head -5

name: compress_extract_linux
description: Compression/extraction: tar, zip, 7z, gzip — créer et extraire archives

args.command: echo 'Formats supportés:' && echo '  tar.gz: tar -czf archive.tar.gz dossier/' && echo '  zip:    zip -r archive.zip dossier/' && echo '  7z:     7z a archive.7z dossier/' && echo '' && echo 'Extraction:' && echo '  tar.gz: tar -xzf archive.tar.gz' && echo '  zip:    unzip archive.zip' && echo '  7z:     7z x archive.7z'

name: calendar_time_linux
description: Date, heure, calendrier, timezone, timer, chronomètre

args.command: echo "Date: $(LANG=fr_FR.UTF-8 date '+%A %d %B %Y')" && echo "Heure: $(date '+%H:%M:%S')" && echo "Timezone: $(timedatectl show -p Timezone --value)" && echo "Uptime: $(uptime -p)"
LANG=fr_FR.UTF-8 cal

name: profil_normal
description: Active le profil vocal normal: toutes commandes, comportement par defaut

args.command: python3 -c "from src.voice_profiles import profile_manager; r=profile_manager.activate_profile('normal'); print(r)"

name: profil_dev
description: Active le profil vocal dev: priorite git, docker, pytest, IDE

args.command: python3 -c "from src.voice_profiles import profile_manager; r=profile_manager.activate_profile('dev'); print(r)"

name: profil_trading
description: Active le profil vocal trading: priorite scans, alertes, pipelines

args.command: cd /home/turbo/jarvis && python3 -c "from src.voice_profiles import profile_manager; r=profile_manager.activate_profile('trading'); print(r)"

name: profil_gaming
description: Active le profil vocal gaming: performance, son max, minimal

args.command: cd /home/turbo/jarvis && python3 -c "from src.voice_profiles import profile_manager; r=profile_manager.activate_profile('gaming'); print(r)"

name: profil_presentation
description: Active le profil vocal presentation: DND, plein ecran, pas de notifications

args.command: cd /home/turbo/jarvis && python3 -c "from src.voice_profiles import profile_manager; r=profile_manager.activate_profile('presentation'); print(r)"
gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.notifications show-banners false

name: profil_sleep
description: Active le profil vocal sleep: economie energie, services reduits, verrouillage

args.command: cd /home/turbo/jarvis && python3 -c "from src.voice_profiles import profile_manager; r=profile_manager.activate_profile('sleep'); print(r)"
loginctl lock-session 2>/dev/null || true

name: profil_debug
description: Active le profil vocal debug: logs verbeux, monitoring detaille

args.command: cd /home/turbo/jarvis && python3 -c "from src.voice_profiles import profile_manager; r=profile_manager.activate_profile('debug'); print(r)"

name: profil_guest
description: Active le profil vocal invite: commandes limitees, pas d'actions destructives

args.command: cd /home/turbo/jarvis && python3 -c "from src.voice_profiles import profile_manager; r=profile_manager.activate_profile('guest'); print(r)"

name: screen_recorder_linux
description: Enregistrement écran: démarrer, arrêter, avec/sans audio

args.command: if pgrep -f 'ffmpeg.*x11grab' >/dev/null; then pkill -f 'ffmpeg.*x11grab' && echo 'Enregistrement arrêté'; else RES=$(xrandr | grep '*' | awk '{print $1}' | head -1) && ffmpeg -f x11grab -framerate 30 -video_size $RES -i :0 -f pulse -i default /tmp/jarvis-record-$(date +%s).mp4 </dev/null &>/dev/null & echo "Enregistrement démarré: /tmp/jarvis-record-*.mp4"; fi

name: clipboard_history_linux
description: Historique presse-papiers: voir, chercher, copier ancien élément

args.command: echo '=== PRESSE-PAPIERS ACTUEL ===' && xclip -selection clipboard -o 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo 'Vide'
echo '=== SÉLECTION ===' && xclip -selection primary -o 2>/dev/null | head -3 || echo 'Pas de sélection'

name: systemd_service_creator
description: Créer un nouveau service systemd user pour un script JARVIS

args.command: echo 'Pour créer un service systemd user:' && echo '1. Crée le fichier: ~/.config/systemd/user/mon-service.service' && echo '2. Contenu minimal:' && echo '[Unit]' && echo 'Description=Mon Service' && echo '[Service]' && echo 'ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /chemin/script.py' && echo 'Restart=on-failure' && echo '[Install]' && echo 'WantedBy=default.target' && echo '' && echo '3. Active: systemctl --user daemon-reload && systemctl --user enable --now mon-service'

name: quick_calculator_linux
description: Calculatrice rapide: opérations mathématiques, pourcentages, conversions

args.command: python3 -c "import math; print('Calculatrice JARVIS prête'); print('Exemples: 2+2, sqrt(144), 15% de 200, sin(pi/2)'); print(f'pi = {math.pi:.6f}'); print(f'e = {math.e:.6f}')"

name: jarvis_stats_complete
description: Statistiques complètes JARVIS: tous les compteurs, métriques, santé globale

args.command: echo '╔═══ JARVIS STATS ═══╗' && echo "Skills: $(python3 -c 'import json;print(len(json.load(open("/home/turbo/jarvis/data/skills.json"))))' 2>/dev/null)" && echo "Voice cmds: $(sqlite3 /home/turbo/jarvis/data/jarvis.db 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voice_commands' 2>/dev/null)" && echo "STT corrections: $(sqlite3 /home/turbo/jarvis/data/jarvis.db 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voice_corrections' 2>/dev/null)" && echo "Macros: $(sqlite3 /home/turbo/jarvis/data/jarvis.db 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voice_macros' 2>/dev/null)" && echo "Dominos: 494" && echo "Improve cycles: $(wc -l < /home/turbo/jarvis/data/improve_cycles.jsonl 2>/dev/null)" && echo "Services: $(systemctl --user list-units 'jarvis*' --no-pager --no-legend 2>/dev/null | grep -c running)" && echo "DB total: $(du -sh /home/turbo/jarvis/data/*.db 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | cut -f1)" && echo '╚═══════════════════╝'
